_comment: Supplemental pool data to extend the upstream bitcoin-data/mining-pools pools.json. Add entries here when a pool uses a coinbase signature not yet in the upstream. Also defines slug_aliases to canonicalize slugs from other data sources (e.g. bitcoin_miners_myrp.parquet) to match the canonical slug derived from pools.json name resolution.

slug_aliases._comment: Maps alternative slugs (as found in bitcoin_miners_myrp.parquet or legacy data) to canonical slugs derived from pools.json name resolution. Canonical slug = to_slug(official_name_from_pools_json).

pool_types._comment: Type overrides for slugs from upstream pools.json where we cannot add a type inline. Values: solo, pool.

supplement_overrides._comment: When bitcoin_blocks_pool.parquet resolves a block to one of these slugs (via coinbase_tag), it beats myrp's more generic attribution. Format: supplement_slug -> list of myrp slugs it overrides.
